title: forme
description: a full-stack e-commerce store for unisex contemporary essentials. Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Supabase (Postgres + Auth + RLS), Tailwind CSS v4, and Zustand. Calm, editorial design system; complete cart-to-checkout flow.

title: flux-kanban
description: A polished, multi-tenant Kanban board. React (Vite) + Tailwind v4 + @dnd-kit + Zustand + motion/react, backed by Supabase for auth and storage.

title: email-sender
description: Email Sender App A Next.js application for sending emails via Sender.net API.

title: barso
description: Barso Homes - Modern Multi-Audience Real Estate Platform A Next.js-powered website serving three distinct audiences: prospective home buyers, trades/subcontractors, and investors.

title: chapter-realestate
description: A full multi-page Next.js 16 website for Chapter Real Estate & Property Management. Built with Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS v4, and lucide-react.

title: andys-barber-shop
description: Marketing website for Andy's Barbershop (Builders Warehouse Malolos) — built with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, Mapbox, and Resend for contact/booking form emails.

title: audy
description: Audio stem separation tool with chord detection. Upload audio files or paste YouTube links to separate tracks into individual stems (drums, bass, vocals, guitar, piano, other).

title: ehfc-tracking
description: Interactive map application for tracking locations in Malolos, Bulacan
